data.body: LANDED: Gerrit stack submitted to main — changes 389(A1 b306) 390(A2 36d1) 407(A3 34b1) 408(C4 943f) 409(C1/C3 a713/acd0) all MERGED. origin/main tip c41a89f71. Local make test 4791 passed. Fixed a rebase module-size gate failure (config.py ceiling 836->839; _processors.py trimmed to 800) folded into A2. Next: refresh + re-assess remaining children (C2 c244, B1 a118, D1 d01e) + A3 live remediation run + close landed child tickets + epic.
